title: oncoba tettensis
intro: Oncoba tettensis, also known as African mistletoe, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oncoba tettensis include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
